etymology.description: 淮(淮) (huái, "Huai River"), 海(海) (hǎi, "sea; large body of water"), 战(戰) (zhàn, "war; battle"), 役(役) (yì, "campaign; service")
etymology.interpretation: 淮(淮) (huái, "Huai River") specifies the geographical region associated with the campaign, which took place near the Huai River. 海(海) (hǎi, "sea") here does not imply an actual sea but rather emphasizes vastness and strategic importance, reflecting the major scale of the campaign area. 战(戰) (zhàn, "war; battle") denotes the military engagement aspect, indicating an organized combat situation. 役(役) (yì, "campaign; service") further specifies this as a large-scale planned military operation. Together, 淮海戰役 (Huáihǎi zhànyì) refers to the significant battle campaign fought in the region near the Huai River, known historically as the Huaihai Campaign.

examples.chinese: 淮海战役(淮海戰役)是中国革命史上的重大战役。
examples.pinyin: Huáihǎi zhànyì shì Zhōngguó gémìng shǐ shàng de zhòngdà zhànyì.
examples.english: The Huaihai Campaign is a significant battle in the history of the Chinese revolution.

examples.chinese: 我们学习了淮海战役(淮海戰役)的战术和战略。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxí le Huáihǎi zhànyì de zhànshù hé zhànlüè.
examples.english: We studied the tactics and strategies of the Huaihai Campaign.

examples.chinese: 为了了解更多历史细节(為了了解更多歷史細節)，你可以查阅有关淮海战役(淮海戰役)的资料。
examples.pinyin: Wèile liǎojiě gèng duō lìshǐ xìjié, nǐ kěyǐ cháyuè yǒuguān Huáihǎi zhànyì de zīliào.
examples.english: To learn more historical details, you can look up information about the Huaihai Campaign.
